title: Operate electrical stimulator
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate electrical stimulator demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work task

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety requirements for task, including personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety requirements for task, including personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety requirements for task, including personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Identify and follow work instruction for using electrical stimulator
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow work instruction for using electrical stimulator?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow work instruction for using electrical stimulator.

pcs.text: Check with electrical tradesperson that stimulator is in working order
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check with electrical tradesperson that stimulator is in working order?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check with electrical tradesperson that stimulator is in working order.

pcs.text: Check equipment is clean and ready for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment is clean and ready for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment is clean and ready for operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work task

elements.title: Follow effective electrical stimulation procedures

pcs.text: Apply electrodes, or monitor electrode connection to carcase, following work instruction and workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply electrodes, or monitor electrode connection to carcase, following work instruction and workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply electrodes, or monitor electrode connection to carcase, following work instruction and workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Check constant contact with electrodes during stimulation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check constant contact with electrodes during stimulation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check constant contact with electrodes during stimulation.

pcs.text: Run stimulation to its full time following workplace or manufacturer's specifications for the type of stimulation equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Run stimulation to its full time following workplace or manufacturer's specifications for the type of stimulation equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Run stimulation to its full time following workplace or manufacturer's specifications for the type of stimulation equipment.

pcs.text: Prevent loss of voltage by ensuring carcases are separated during stimulation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prevent loss of voltage by ensuring carcases are separated during stimulation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prevent loss of voltage by ensuring carcases are separated during stimulation.

pcs.text: Check for ineffective stimulation and, where identified, identify carcase and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for ineffective stimulation and, where identified, identify carcase and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for ineffective stimulation and, where identified, identify carcase and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Follow effective electrical stimulation procedures
